sentences.target: Je cuisine tandis que tu ranges.

translations.fr: Je cuisine tandis que tu ranges.
translations.en: I'm cooking while you tidy up.
translations.it: Cucino mentre tu metti in ordine.
translations.tr: Ben yemek yapıyorum, sen ortalığı topluyorsun.
translations.vi: Tôi nấu ăn trong khi bạn dọn dẹp.
translations.hu: Én főzök, amíg te rendet raksz.
translations.hi: मैं खाना बना रहा हूँ जबकि तुम सफाई कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: Jeg lager mat mens du rydder.
translations.sv: Jag lagar mat medan du städar.
translations.ro: Eu gătesc în timp ce tu faci ordine.
translations.da: Jeg laver mad, mens du rydder op.
translations.fi: Minä laitan ruokaa samalla kun sinä siivoat.
translations.ja: 私が料理している間、あなたは片付ける。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
First element of the compound subordinator ‘tandis que’ introducing a contrastive temporal clause.
Second element of ‘tandis que’; subordinator introducing the finite subordinate clause.
Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative, 2nd person singular.

sentences.target: Elle lit tandis que nous regardons la télé.
sentences.reading: /ɛl li tɑ̃di kə nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ la tele/

translations.fr: Elle lit tandis que nous regardons la télé.
translations.ipa: /ɛl li tɑ̃di kə nu ʁəɡaʁdɔ̃ la tele/
translations.en: She is reading while we watch TV.
translations.es: Ella lee mientras nosotros vemos la tele.
translations.it: Lei legge mentre noi guardiamo la TV.
translations.ko: 그녀는 책을 읽는 동안 우리는 TV를 본다.
translations.ru: Она читает, пока мы смотрим телевизор.
translations.pt: Ela lê enquanto nós assistimos à TV.
translations.he: היא קוראת בזמן שאנחנו צופים בטלוויזיה.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đọc sách trong khi chúng tôi xem TV.
translations.ar: هي تقرأ بينما نحن نشاهد التلفاز.
translations.nl: Ze leest terwijl wij tv kijken.
translations.uk: Вона читає, поки ми дивимося телевізор.
translations.hu: Ő olvas, amíg mi tévét nézünk.
translations.hi: वह पढ़ रही है जबकि हम टीवी देख रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Ona czyta, a my oglądamy telewizję.
translations.el: Αυτή διαβάζει ενώ εμείς βλέπουμε τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Hun leser mens vi ser på TV.
translations.id: Dia membaca sementara kami menonton TV.
translations.sv: Hon läser medan vi tittar på tv.
translations.ro: Ea citește în timp ce noi ne uităm la televizor.
translations.cs: Ona čte, zatímco my se díváme na televizi.
translations.da: Hun læser, mens vi ser tv.
translations.fi: Hän lukee samalla kun me katsomme televisiota.
translations.ja: 彼女が本を読んでいる間、私たちはテレビを見る。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
First element of the compound subordinator ‘tandis que’.
Second element of ‘tandis que’; introduces the subordinate clause.
Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘télé’.
Common noun (colloquial for ‘télévision’), feminine singular; direct object.

sentences.target: On discute tandis que les enfants jouent.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ diskyt tɑ̃di kə lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ ʒu/

translations.fr: On discute tandis que les enfants jouent.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ diskyt tɑ̃di kə lez ɑ̃fɑ̃ ʒu/
translations.en: We chat while the kids play.
translations.de: Wir unterhalten uns, während die Kinder spielen.
translations.pt: Nós conversamos enquanto as crianças brincam.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trò chuyện trong khi bọn trẻ chơi.
translations.nl: We praten terwijl de kinderen spelen.
translations.hu: Mi beszélgetünk, amíg a gyerekek játszanak.
translations.hi: हम बात करते हैं जबकि बच्चे खेलते हैं.
translations.ro: Noi discutăm în timp ce copiii se joacă.
translations.cs: Povídáme si, zatímco děti si hrají.
translations.fi: Me juttelemme samalla kun lapset leikkivät.
translations.ja: 私たちが話している間、子どもたちは遊ぶ。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun, syntactically 3rd person singular (often ‘we’ in speech).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with ‘on’).
First element of the compound subordinator ‘tandis que’.
Second element of ‘tandis que’; introduces the finite clause.
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘enfants’.
Common noun, plural; subject of ‘jouent’.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative, 3rd person plural.

sentences.target: Tu conduis tandis que j’indique la route.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ̃dɥi tɑ̃di kə ʒɛ̃dik la ʁut/

translations.fr: Tu conduis tandis que j’indique la route.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ̃dɥi tɑ̃di kə ʒɛ̃dik la ʁut/
translations.en: You drive while I give directions.
translations.es: Tú conduces mientras yo te indico el camino.
translations.de: Du fährst, während ich dir den Weg zeige.
translations.it: Tu guidi mentre io do indicazioni.
translations.ru: Ты ведёшь, а я подсказываю дорогу.
translations.pt: Você dirige enquanto eu indico o caminho.
translations.he: אתה נוהג בזמן שאני מראה את הדרך.
translations.tr: Sen sürüyorsun, ben yol tarif ediyorum.
translations.vi: Bạn lái xe trong khi tôi chỉ đường.
translations.ar: أنت تقود بينما أنا أدلّك على الطريق.
translations.nl: Jij rijdt terwijl ik de weg wijs.
translations.uk: Ти керуєш, а я підказую дорогу.
translations.hu: Te vezetsz, én pedig útbaigazítást adok.
translations.hi: तुम गाड़ी चलाते हो जबकि मैं रास्ता बताता हूँ.
translations.pl: Ty prowadzisz, a ja wskazuję drogę.
translations.el: Εσύ οδηγείς ενώ εγώ δείχνω τον δρόμο.
translations.nb: Du kjører mens jeg viser veien.
translations.id: Kamu menyetir sementara aku menunjukkan jalan.
translations.sv: Du kör medan jag visar vägen.
translations.ro: Tu conduci în timp ce eu îți arăt drumul.
translations.cs: Ty řídíš, zatímco já ukazuji cestu.
translations.da: Du kører, mens jeg viser vejen.
translations.fi: Sinä ajat samalla kun minä näytän tietä.
translations.ja: あなたが運転している間、私は道を案内する.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
First element of the compound subordinator ‘tandis que’.
Second element of ‘tandis que’; introduces the subordinate clause.
Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ with elision before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb of the subordinate clause, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘route’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object.
